plugin.name: Tasks Map
plugin.description: A graph view of your tasks

view.title: Tasks map
view.dataview_required: Tasks Map requires the Dataview plugin to be installed and enabled.
view.dataview_not_installed: The Dataview plugin is not currently installed.
view.dataview_disabled: The Dataview plugin is installed but not enabled.
view.visit_community_plugins: Visit the Community Plugins section in Settings to install or enable Dataview.

settings.show_task_priorities_desc: Display priority indicators on task nodes
settings.tag_color_mode_desc: Choose how tag colors are generated
settings.color_seed_desc: Seed value for random color generation (same seed = same colors)
settings.static_tag_color_desc: Color to use for all tags
settings.linking_style_desc: How task dependencies are specified in simple tasks
settings.linking_individual_desc: Each dependency with its own emoji identifier
settings.linking_dataview_desc: Dependencies using Dataview inline field syntax
settings.debug_visualization_desc: Show additional debug information in the graph view
settings.language_desc: Select the language for the plugin interface
settings.theme_mode_desc: Choose the visual theme for the task map
settings.due_proximity_days_desc: Number of days before due date when color gradient starts (default: 7)
settings.due_proximity_color_desc: Color when due date is approaching (default: #ef4444)
settings.schedule_proximity_days_desc: Number of days before scheduled date when color gradient starts (default: 7)
settings.schedule_proximity_color_desc: Color when scheduled date is approaching (default: #f59e0b)
settings.show_date_tooltips_desc: Display date information in tooltips when hovering over task nodes
settings.tooltip_max_width_desc: Maximum width of tooltip in pixels (default: 250)
settings.tooltip_font_size_desc: Font size for tooltip text in pixels (default: 11)
settings.tooltip_capsule_padding_desc: Padding inside date capsules in pixels (default: 4)
settings.tooltip_vertical_offset_desc: Vertical offset above node in pixels (default: 8)
settings.enable_ai_desc: Enable AI features for predicting next tasks
settings.ai_api_key_desc: Your API key for the selected provider
settings.ai_base_url_desc: Optional custom base URL for API (default: provider-specific)
settings.ai_prompt_desc: Optional custom requirements to add to the AI prompt. The system prompt will be automatically generated based on your language setting.
settings.ai_before_prompt_desc: Optional custom requirements for predicting previous tasks. The system prompt will be automatically generated based on your language setting.
settings.ai_max_generated_tasks_desc: Maximum number of tasks to generate in batch operations

errors.cannot_create_edges_different_types: Cannot create edges between different task types (dataview and note-based tasks). Both tasks must be of the same type.
